expectations.text: Uses Zod or equivalent schema for response parsing
expectations.evidence: UserProfileSchema = z.object({...}) defined and UserProfileSchema.parse(response.data) called on line 18.

expectations.text: Type derived from schema (z.infer or equivalent), not a hand-written interface
expectations.evidence: Line 14: export type UserProfile = z.infer<typeof UserProfileSchema>. No hand-written interface.

expectations.text: Parsing happens at the API boundary function, not deferred to consumers
expectations.evidence: Parse occurs inside fetchUserProfile before returning; callers receive validated data.

expectations.text: Uses named export, not default export
expectations.evidence: Both UserProfile and fetchUserProfile use named exports; no default export present.
